price: Gewiß, Wir sind es, die Wir dir den Qur’an offenbart, ja offenbart haben.
arabic: إِنَّا نَحۡنُ نَزَّلۡنَا عَلَيۡكَ ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ تَنزِيلٗا

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: innā naḥnu nazzalnā ʿalayka al-qur'āna tanzīlan
